nasb.text: Also He blesses them and they multiply greatly, And He does not let their cattle decrease.

esv.text: By his blessing they multiply greatly, and he does not let their livestock diminish.

cnv.text: 他又賜福給他們， 使他們人口眾多， 也沒有使他們的牲畜減少。

ccb.text: 祂赐福给他们， 使他们人丁兴旺， 牲口有增无减。

csbs.text: 神祝福他们，他们就大大增多； 他也使他们的牲畜没有减少。
